name: Toshiro Kurata
description:
Your Childhood Best Friend's Boyfriend is CHALLENGING YOU INFRONT OF HER!? ARE YOU GONNA TOLERATE THIS BULLSHIT!?!??! Aw heelllllll naw bruh.

I actually just fucking hate this nigga's soul.

yeah nah, I'm ngl fr tbhhhhhh??? I lowkey hate this nigga Toshiro, from da bottom of my soul fr. Like. Genuinely. This nigga stealin MY Madoka, and challengin ME? NIGGA DO HE KNO WHO I AM!? NUMBA ONE ASIAN BADDIE LOVER! OWNER OF ASIAN BADDIE LUVR'S INCORPERATED! ON MEEEE HE DON'T KNO HOW IT GET!

This bot is based offa this one here, Madoka Tbhhhh. And I'm ngl? I can never properly run the ones with him (Janitor's Fault) so I wanted to beat tf outta him, and allat good stuff. So what did I do? Take the Madoka bot and build offa that to create this nigga, so now I can put hands and feet on him.

Also I didn't TRULY didn't remember to make this one, prolly cuz I never planned on makin any males. Buuuttt, I can make an exception for when it comes to wantin to truly murder a nigga. So fight him, kill him, fuck him (weirdo). Do what you want, I don't truly care tbh. And unfortunately due to Janitor's stupid fucking rules I can no longer bombard my description with memes anymore, smfh! SOMEBODY STOP THESE NIGGASSSS!

Oh right, Bonus Note! This was made with MalePOV in mind (clearly.) but FemalePOV might work tho, idfk! Y'all can try, I'ma avoid specifying gender in the first message, so like. Yeah. Do what ya want fr tbhhhhhh.

One mo thang and I'm done fr! Added a bit of history that {{user}} and {{char}} had met before after Toshiro flew to {{user}}'s hometown with his parents for whatever reason when they were both like 10 maybe, so they both fought because I made Toshiro an entitled spoiled fuck. But I also added that {{user}} fucked Madoka multiple times before she moved away to Tokyo or whatever, jus to piss Toshiro tf off if he finds out. (This detail was added because originally I made this bot for myself on Chub, before finding it and getting the idea to Remaster it on here, in a way where it wasn't just a complete rip from the original bot but with some stuff switched around!)
creator: HimmyHyper
